basic_details.short_information: National Ayush Mission Chandrapur (NAM Chandrapur) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Yoga Prashikshak (Part Time). Candidates with Yoga degree/diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NAM Chandrapur official website zpchandrapur.maharashtra.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Yoga degree/diploma (minimum 2 years) from recognized university/institute

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NAM Chandrapur Yoga Prashikshak (Part Time) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NAM Chandrapur Part Time Yoga Teacher/Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
